description: Returns a list of relevant followers for a specific FID. This usually shows on a profile as "X, Y and Z follow this user".

parameters.name: target_fid
parameters.description: User who's profile you are looking at

parameters.name: viewer_fid
parameters.description: The FID of the user to customize this response for. Providing this will also return a list of followers that respects this user's mutes and blocks and includes `viewer_context`.
